changes.before:
Machine learning engineer with three years of experience building evaluated
ML models, retrieval-augmented APIs, and monitored AWS deployments. M.S. in
Applied Data Science with strengths across Python, PyTorch, and MLOps.
changes.after: AI engineer with expertise in RAG, AWS, and MLOps, delivering scalable solutions for enterprise risk modeling and knowledge retrieval.
changes.reason: Aligns with the job's required role and skills, emphasizing relevant experience.

changes.before:
Built Python and scikit-learn risk models over SQL pipelines,
      raising validated recall by 14\% at a constant false-positive rate.
changes.after: Built Python and scikit-learn risk models over SQL data pipelines, raising validated recall by 14% while holding the false-positive rate constant.
changes.reason: Highlights recall improvement without introducing unsupported metrics.

changes.before:
Delivered a RAG knowledge API with FastAPI, embeddings, and
      vector search, reducing median analyst lookup time by 36\% in a pilot.
changes.after: Delivered a retrieval-augmented knowledge API with FastAPI, embeddings, and vector search, reducing median analyst lookup time by 36% in a controlled pilot.
changes.reason: Demonstrates impact on analyst efficiency with supported numeric claim.
